compiled_state.title: Update REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 3 to handle size rejection and model override
compiled_state.parent_id: w21-nv42  # As a DSO practitioner, oversized diffs are rejected with actionable guidance
compiled_state.description: Update REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 3 to extract SIZE_ACTION and DIFF_SIZE_LINES from classifier output and apply size-based routing: SIZE_ACTION=upgrade triggers a model override to the opus reviewer at current tier scope; SIZE_ACTION=reject rejects the diff with a structured error message and line count. Merge commits and re-review passes bypass size limits.
